events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: **decision = pass**, **risk = low**. The field method deviates from shop-preferred practice cosmetically but still conforms to the listed product instructions and project requirement, with no local amendment or drawing note prohibiting it — and nothing suggests a Table 310.16 ampacity or sizing violation. Recommended action is just to document the method/listing reference and confirm ampacity factors at rough-in closeout, not any rework.
